rows.source_ref: whatfx et al., "Best trading systems on forexfactory" (ForexFactory thread 265214, ~2010-2011), https://www.forexfactory.com/thread/265214/best-trading-systems-on-forexfactory
rows.concept: A survey/opinion thread pointing to other systems by name/link with no mechanical rules of its own.
rows.eligibility_reason: Pure meta-discussion: lists/links other threads (Nanningbob 4HR, The Dance/Choros, Vegas Tunnel, DIBS, THV, Igrok, mouteki, fozzy, SRDC 2, Philip Nel, Sonic R, 'daily 95 pips') and trading psychology chatter; no entry/exit/params stated for any strategy in this thread.
rows.notes: Only quasi-rules present: Ronald Raygun coin-toss (heads long/tails short + discretionary manage = random entry, not a system) and a passing note that 'zaman's 2 lines' = 9pm close +/-30 pips (signal-line construction, no exit). The named referenced systems would each need to be harvested from their own source threads, not this one.
